prompt: Using the CodeGrapher MCP server, produce a Mermaid flowchart LR data-flow diagram for the Producer sub-system of the stress-test codebase. Entry point: producer/main.cc. Include the 5-hop internal chain (trigger_event through dispatch_event), proto vs WSDL serializer branch, full typedef chain (RawBytes → MessageBody → Payload → PayloadHandle → PayloadHandlePP), and Envelope type. Use only MCP tools. Save diagram to outputs/skill_output.md and tool call log to outputs/tool_calls.json.
assertions: Diagram contains at least 2 nodes from the typedef chain (RawBytes, MessageBody, Payload, PayloadHandle)
Tool call log exists and is non-empty
